---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us identify and fix a bug.
title: 'fix: [Brief Description of Bug]'
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Console Logs
If applicable, add screenshots, screen recordings, or Chrome/Firefox console error logs to help explain your problem.

## Environment Details
Please complete the following information:
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Ubuntu]
- Browser [e.g. chrome, safari, firefox]
- Version [e.g. 22]
- Device (if mobile) [e.g. iPhone 14]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
